reference_machine: Apple M5 Pro MacBook Pro, 18 cores, 48 GB RAM
refreeze_reason: The July 22 refreeze binds the corrected 25-case SEC corpus and the final ornith:9b pipeline after adding complete-wording Ask projections, concise Brief repair, fail-closed fragment guards, amendment supersession retrieval, deterministic legal-change observations, numbered-source ordinal duration binding, and a source-anchored subcontract audit observation. The quality repair can add a second local generation pass. A fresh three-source HealthNet pilot measured 38.602 seconds for Brief and 16.849 seconds for an evidence-backed answerable Ask. The measured Brief no longer fits the obsolete 35-second budget, so the regression budget remains frozen at 45 seconds; the canonical 50-operation run must still demonstrate the final p95 and the ten-minute first-value contract remains unchanged.
invalidation_rule: Re-measure and re-freeze when the model, prompt scheme, retrieval pipeline, corpus, or reference machine changes.
